mapper.select: SELECT sk.id, sk.scene_id, sk.knowledge_id, sk.enabled, sk.created_at, kb.name AS knowledge_name FROM ai_scene_knowledge sk LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON sk.knowledge_id = kb.id WHERE sk.scene_id = #{sceneId} ORDER BY sk.created_at ASC

SELECT sk.id, sk.scene_id, sk.knowledge_id, sk.enabled, sk.created_at, kb.name AS knowledge_name FROM ai_scene_knowledge sk LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON sk.knowledge_id = kb.id WHERE sk.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_scene_knowledge WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId} AND knowledge_id = #{knowledgeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_scene_knowledge (scene_id, knowledge_id, enabled, created_at) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{knowledgeId}, #{enabled}, NOW())
